title: Vaccinium schlechterianum
taxonomy: Vaccinium schlechterianum belongs to the family Ericaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the heath family. This family includes over 4,000 species of plants, many of which are found in cold, wet environments. Vaccinium schlechterianum is a genus within the Ericaceae family, which includes other types of plants like blueberries and cranberries. The specific classification of Vaccinium schlechterianum includes the kingdom Plantae, and it is often found in mountainous regions. The genus Vaccinium is closely related to other plant genera, such as Loiseleuria and Oligotis.
